mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = true LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO addresses (user_id, label, street, city, state, postal_code, country, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{label}, #{street}, #{city}, #{state}, #{postalCode}, #{country}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET is_default = false WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
